CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-23-2022 Continued To Jan-25-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-17-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Thomas Koster, Esq. (415.713.8680; Thomas@kosterleadbetterlaw.com) of Koster & Leadbetter LLP for Defendants.
No other appearances.

ARGUED The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS CDXX LLC, HAPPYLAND LLC and ST COMAS LLC'S DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

CDXX LLC, HAPPYLAND LLC, and ST COMAS LLC's demurrer is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with CCP 430.41, which requires that the parties conduct a "meet and confer in person or by telephone" before a demurrer is filed. The parties are ordered to meet and confer immediately and defendant response to the petition is now due by December 15, 2022.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)
